message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["5","[[0, 1, -5], [1, 0, -4], [0, 2, -5], [1, 2, -5], [2, 3, -1], [3, 4, -2], [3, 3, -100], [0, 4, 0]]"],"focus":"All-negative and zero weights with duplicate edges of differing weights and a self-loop that must be ignored; tests duplicate-edge min-weight selection and lexicographic tie-breaking for equal-weight MSTs."},{"input_lines":["6","[[0, 1, 2], [1, 2, 3], [2, 0, 4], [3, 4, 1], [4, 3, 1], [1, 1, 0]]"],"focus":"Disconnected graph (node 5 isolated) — should return None; includes duplicate undirected edge and a self-loop to ensure these are handled correctly."},{"input_lines":["7","[[0, 1, 1], [0, 1, 0], [1, 2, 1], [2, 3, 1], [3, 0, 1], [1, 4, 2], [2, 4, 2], [3, 5, -3], [2, 5, 0], [4, 6, 1], [5, 6, 2], [6, 4, 1], [6, 6, 100]]"],"focus":"Complex connected graph with equal-weight cycles, a lower-weight duplicate edge (forces picking minimum duplicate), zero and negative edges; stresses tie-breaking for MST, swap deltas, second-best tree calculations, and handling of ignored self-loops."}]}
